description: Extract the text content of a .pptx as Markdown using markitdown (python -m markitdown). Read-only — the deck is not modified; the extracted text is written to extract.md under record_store for downstream summarization, search, or QA grep.
rules: read-only — never writes back to PPTX_FILE
requires markitdown with the [pptx] extra (pip install 'markitdown[pptx]'); degrades gracefully when the extra/module is absent
extracted Markdown is captured to extract.md under record_store
usage: Set PPTX_FILE (path to a .pptx). Output: extract.md (Markdown text dump).
limitation: Text-only extraction — images, charts, and layout/positioning are not captured. For a visual overview use the thumbnail perk.
